title: The 5 Steps of Dashboarding Cycle
author: Pinheiro
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The 5 Steps of Dashboarding Cycle 

 LO1: Students are able to understand the concepts around dashboarding. 

 LO2: Students are able to design dashboards. 

 LO3: Students are able to build a dashboard using Google Data Studio.
